outcome.title: Closed Forms
outcome.description: Find the closed form for a partial sum series and use it to evaluate an infinite series.

outcome.title: Integral Test
outcome.description: Apply the integral test to determine if a series converges or diverges.

outcome.title: Direct Comparison Test
outcome.description: Apply the direct comparison test to determine if a series converges or diverges.

outcome.title: Limit Comparison Test
outcome.description: Apply the limit comparison test to determine if a series converges or diverges.
